  • Method Details

    • initContextWithAgendaUids

      @Deprecated public void initContextWithAgendaUids(io.vertigo.ui.core.ViewContext viewContext, List<io.vertigo.datamodel.data.model.UID<Agenda>> ageUids, Integer weekDaysNumber, CreationPlageHoraireForm creationPlageHoraireForm, DuplicationSemaineForm duplicationSemaineForm, boolean modeGuichet, boolean modeTranchesHoraire)
      Deprecated.
      Init context for agenda page.
      Parameters:
      viewContext - ViewContext
      ageUids - list of agenda UIDs
      weekDaysNumber - number of days
      creationPlageHoraireForm - initialized form for creating
      duplicationSemaineForm - initialized form for duplicating
      modeGuichet - true if mode guichet
      modeTranchesHoraire - true if mode tranche horaire (don't show plages)

    • initContext

      public void initContext(io.vertigo.ui.core.ViewContext viewContext, io.vertigo.datamodel.data.model.DtList<AgendaDisplay> agendasDisplay, Integer weekDaysNumber, CreationPlageHoraireForm creationPlageHoraireForm, DuplicationSemaineForm duplicationSemaineForm, boolean modeGuichet, boolean modeTranchesHoraire)
      Init context for agenda page.
      Parameters:
      viewContext - ViewContext
      weekDaysNumber - number of days
      creationPlageHoraireForm - initialized form for creating
      duplicationSemaineForm - initialized form for duplicating
      modeGuichet - true if mode guichet
      modeTranchesHoraire - true if mode tranche horaire (don't show plages)
      ageUids - list of agenda UIDs

      protected io.vertigo.datamodel.data.model.DtList<InfoCalendrierDisplay> getInfoCalendrierForRange(io.vertigo.ui.core.ViewContext viewContext, LocalDate startDate, LocalDate endDate)
      Overridable method to get info calendrier for a date range.
      Parameters:
      viewContext - ViewContext
      startDate - First date of the range (included)
      endDate - Last date of the range (included)
      Returns:
      List of InfoCalendrierDisplay
